_comment: CANONICAL COMMITTED POLICY for the Injective deployment. Its SHA-256 (over this file, canonicalised: sorted keys, no whitespace, keys starting with _ stripped) is published to the agent's identity BEFORE code-lock; every live decision receipt references that hash. Injective Nova: spot trading on Helix (Exchange precompile 0x65) via the SpotExecutor contract. Same survival-first strategy as the BNB deployment, retuned for the INJ/USDT universe and testnet sizes. Each deployment commits its own config.

trending._comment: Single-asset INJ/USDT universe for the testnet integration; trending admission off.

signal._comment: Take risk only when 1h and 4h momentum agree in sign AND realized vol < vol_enter_max.

risk._comment: max_drawdown_pct is the survival gate. Risky exposure cap set to 20% for the testnet demo so a trade clears the market's 1 USDT min notional at small subaccount NAV; the mainnet committed config uses 12%. The drawdown ladder and elimination gate are unchanged.

min_trades._comment: Scheduled tiny in-policy rebalances guarantee the minimum qualifying trade count without overtrading.

data._comment: CMC MCP is the only market-data source; stale data (age > max_data_age_seconds) blocks trading.
